title: The Environment and History of Pegan Hill and Rocky Narrows Premiere Conservation Lands
author: George Mumford
description: Around 1930, George Saltonstall Mumford IV’s grandparents purchased approximately seventy-five acres on Pegan Hill, bordering The Trustees of Reservations’ (TTORs’) original thirty-six acres on top of Pegan Hill.
